title: Dog Adoption Event
description: Partner rescue organizations bring adoptable dogs to our store every 2nd and 4th weekend of the month. All adopted dogs come with a vet check, flea treatment, and first shots.
recurrenceNote: Every 2nd and 4th weekend of the month

title: Low-Cost Vaccination Clinic
description: Affordable vaccinations for dogs and cats provided by a licensed mobile vet clinic. No appointment needed. Vaccines include rabies, DHPP, FVRCP, and more.

title: Aquarium Setup Workshop
description: Learn how to set up and cycle a freshwater aquarium from scratch. Our aquatic specialists will walk you through choosing a tank, adding substrate, live plants, and fish.

title: Valentine's Day Pet Sale
description: Celebrate Valentine's Day with your pets! Enjoy 20% off all toys, treats, and beds across all categories.

title: Store Tour — Aquatic Section
description: Guided tours of our world-class aquatic section led by our senior aquarist. See our display tanks, talk about fish care, and get expert advice on your setup.
